task_params.title: Youth Session: Basic Vehicle Safety and Road Awareness
task_params.content_brief: One-page note for a youth session covering simple vehicle safety tips and road awareness.
safety_points: check seat belts before the car moves
walk around the vehicle and watch for kids or objects
keep eyes on the road and limit phone distractions
follow speed limits and leave safe stopping distance
use turn signals and check mirrors before changing lanes
watch road signs, crosswalks, and school zones
never ride with an unsafe or impaired driver
speak up if something in the car feels unsafe
